/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/SussurroDockPet.dir/sussurro_main.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/SussurroDockPet.dir/Users/Lithos/Documents/GitHub/Ark-DeskPet/mac-dockpet/MacWindowUtils.mm.o" -o SussurroDockPet.app/Contents/MacOS/SussurroDockPet  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-graphics.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-window.3.0.2.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libsfml-system.3.0.2.dylib spine-cpp-build/libspine-cpp.a -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL
